subtitle: Founding Chief AI & Data Officer -- Mission-Driven Technology | Data & AI Platforms | Nonprofit Operating Depth
summary_text: Senior technology executive with a 14-year arc as the first CTO in a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit's 45-year history -- the founding-executive shape this role describes. Owned the data function end-to-end from DBA / SQL Architect origin through enterprise data warehouse maturation through production ML deployment via DataRobot, all under continuous regulatory scrutiny (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB across all 50 states). Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; built the Enterprise PMO from scratch (25% improvement on $30-50M portfolio); sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm. Mission-driven technology leadership, regulatory-grade governance, and bottom-up data-stack credibility from practitioner foundation through executive ownership.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Appointed as the first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history -- founding-executive scope: built the technology function and team from within, reporting to the CEO, with full accountability for strategy, architecture, team, vendor relationships, and public presence.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years through a consensus / earned-veto operating model and servant-leader practice.
Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.
Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.
Public-facing technical leadership: 4-5 board engagements per year; CFPB and 50-state regulatory presentations; CEO-level reporting throughout the CTO tenure.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients including mission-driven and content-focused organizations.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).

Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, AI Governance, Responsible AI Practice
